title: THIS Is The Biggest Mistake Most Millennials Make

transcript.text: I think about like most Millennials I
know they're kind of just like adrift
they have like they rent an apartment
they travel yeah their relationships are
all sort of single serve or ephemeral
and they have unlimited options but the
whole point is you have to like choose
some of the things and invest in them
and so they have this kind of tenuous
connection not just to reality but they
also have like a tenuous connection to
like Society like they don't own
anything they don't uh they're not
committed to anything or anyone and so
they're kind of just like adrift well
it's almost as if they inherited the
Boomer sort of like crazy optimism that
the Boomers got from the fact that they
had all these like economic Tailwinds

without the economic Tailwinds and so
it's like their features don't really

and then you wake up and you're like 40

apartment you're on Tinder and ordering
from Postmates yeah it's like they're so
depressing
